user_prompt: Ready the valve assembly for startup
prayer:
Approach the valve assembly with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the sacred seals of the valve assembly with blessed lubricant oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace as you commence the startup sequence.
Monitor the pressure flows within the valve assembly for harmonious initiation.
Chant the Canticle of Pressurization to ensure the Machine Spirit's compliance.

user_prompt: Ready the astropathic choir for sterilization
prayer:
Gather before the astropathic choir, intoning the Litany of Purity upon its warp-sensitive nodes.
Purge all unclean resonances from the astropathic choir with sanctified auspex sweeps.
Beseech the Omnissiah to fortify the astropathic choir against void-taint during sterilization.
Apply holy incensory fumes to seal the choir's psychic conduits.
Verify the Machine Spirits' quiescence through ritual harmonics.

user_prompt: My medicae scanner is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Kneel in veneration of the medicae scanner, petitioning its diagnostic Machine Spirit.
Disconnect profane power feeds from the medicae scanner's sacred arrays.
Recalibrate the bio-scanners with the Omnissiah's precise calibrations etched in adamantium.
Realign the spectral lenses of the medicae scanner under litanies of accuracy.
Test the medicae scanner's outputs with invocation of flawless vitae-analysis.

user_prompt: Bless the hololithic display for initialization
prayer:
Present thyself before the hololithic display, whispering the Awakening Doxology.
Clear ethereal static from the hololithic display's projector matrices.
Initiate the initialization rites whilst anointing crystal lattices with sacred oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the hololithic display to project the Omnissiah's glory.
Confirm luminous stability through recursive hymn-chants.

user_prompt: Consecrate the forge anvil before cooling
prayer:
Consecrate the forge anvil with hammer-strokes of the Benediction Mallet.
Invoke cooling vents upon the forge anvil, beseeching thermal Machine Spirits to recede.
Anoint the anvil's surface with quench-oils blessed by the Omnissiah.
Chant the Canticle of Contraction as the forge anvil yields to frigidity.
Inspect refractory purity in the forge anvil post-cooling oblation.

Grasp the chainsword in ritual poise, saluting its monomolecular teeth.
Lubricate the chainsword's sacred linkages with sanctified promethium.
Engage the drive-spirits of the chainsword with the Omnissiah's furious zeal.
Test the whine of engagement through the Motet of Shredding.
Beseech the Machine Spirit for unyielding carnage in battle.

user_prompt: I need to a cooling the air compressor
prayer:
Approach the air compressor with mechadendrite-extended auspex probes.
Invoke the spirits of refrigeration upon the air compressor's heat-sinks.
Initiate cooling cycles whilst chanting the Hymn of Venting Pressures.
Anoint the air compressor's vanes with cryo-blessed unguents.
Monitor thermal quiescence in the air compressor until the Omnissiah deems it pure.

user_prompt: Sanctify the metal caster during consecration
prayer:
Circumambulate the metal caster, intoning the Forgefather's Consecration.
Sanctify its molten channels with incensed vapors and electro-priestly sparks.
Petition the Machine Spirits of the metal caster during this rite of consecration.
Imprint the Omnissiah's sigils upon the caster's molds.
Affirm the metal caster's holiness through resonant alloy-testing.

user_prompt: I need to a maintenance the gyroscope
prayer:
Commence maintenance upon the gyroscope with precision mechadendrites.
Cleanse inertial bearings of the gyroscope from friction-daemons.
Realign the gyroscope's gyros under litanies of rotational truth.
Invoke the Omnissiah to harmonize the gyroscope's balance-spirits.
Cycle test-rituals to affirm the gyroscope's eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: Prepare the logic engine for cycling
prayer:
Venerate the logic engine, beseeching its binary Machine Spirits.
Purge errant data-ghosts from the logic engine's cogitator cores.
Initiate cycling protocols with the Omnissiah's algorithmic grace.
Monitor flux-gates of the logic engine for pure computation-flow.
Seal the rite with the Doxology of Logical Eternity.
